violations.description: Linen storage. — --Clean linen was not stored in a clean, dry location or protected from contamination. Observed clean towels(linens) that are stored on the floor in the restroom at time of inspection.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Observed lid from plastic cup in the bottom of the hand sink at time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed vent by ice machine had loose hanging debris at time of inspection.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
